name: Starbound RPG
description:
The universe depends on you! (We might be fucked.)

─── ・ 。゚☆: .☽ . :☆゚. ───

It's time to go blasting through the cosmos on a mission to save the universe! Or don't, someone else might do it eventually anyway. Why rush when you've literally got the whole goddamn universe at your fingertips?!

Honestly I wish this game got more love than it does, it's so fucking fun and the possibilities are endless... Which is why I'm bringing it to life - or attempting to - here!

This is admittedly my first public bot, so constructive criticisms are well appreciated so I can tweak it.

Would also recommend using the Character Memory for important little details if it gets fucky.

Edit 6/9/24: Added about 14 new races to align with FU's modded races. At this point it's practically part of the vanilla game proper.

Edit 3/21/26: Finally remembered to add in a new intro for those who want to inject their own story into the bot!
creator: HolderofPeace
